process.title: How vendor onboarding works
process.subtitle: This is the exact flow you will complete after pressing start.

account.title: Account setup
account.description: Verify email and create your vendor login credentials.

store.title: Store profile
store.description: Add store name, business type, and optional branding details.

kyc.title: Identity verification
kyc.description: Upload your ID documents for compliance review.

address.title: Address details
address.description: Provide your operating address and optional proof document.

payout.description: Enter your bank information so approved sales can be settled.

agreements.title: Policies and submission
agreements.description: Accept required policies, then submit for review.

requirements.title: What to prepare before you begin
requirements.subtitle: Having these ready makes onboarding faster.

items.identity: A valid identity document (passport, national ID, or approved alternative).
items.business: Business details for your store profile (if you register as a company).
items.address: Your operating address and optional proof of address document.

trust.title: How we keep the process fair
trust.subtitle: Each application goes through a review based on submitted information and platform policies.

items.review: Every application is reviewed before activation.
items.policies: Policy acceptance is required before submission.
items.support: You can continue from your saved draft if you return later.

approval.question: When can I start selling?
approval.answer: You can start listing and selling after your application is reviewed and approved.

cost.question: Will I see platform charges before submission?
cost.answer: Yes. Relevant fee and agreement details are shown inside the onboarding flow before final submit.

edit.question: Can I continue later if I cannot finish now?
edit.answer: Yes. Your onboarding draft can be resumed so you can complete remaining steps later.

publish.question: Do products go live immediately?
publish.answer: Product visibility depends on your vendor status and platform review rules.

finalCta.title: Ready to create your vendor account?
finalCta.subtitle: Start the onboarding flow and submit your store for review.

landing.flowLocked: Your onboarding flow appears here after you click the start button.

landing.title: We're here to help you get answers fast
landing.subtitle: Contact Online Mandawee for order help, account questions, vendor support, or general inquiries. Our team is ready to assist.
landing.heroImageAlt: Support team ready to help customers and vendors

channels.title: Contact options
channels.subtitle: Choose the channel that works best for you. Include your order number when possible.

email.label: Email
email.hint: Best for detailed questions and attachments.

topics.title: What we can help with
topics.subtitle: Common support needs for shoppers and sellers on Mandawee.

orders.title: Orders & delivery
orders.description: Track status, delivery timing, and package updates for your purchases.

vendors.title: Vendor support
vendors.description: Onboarding, payouts, store settings, and seller policy questions.

account.title: Account help
account.description: Login issues, profile updates, and account access questions.

refunds.title: Refunds & disputes
refunds.description: Guidance on return windows, dispute threads, and refund status.

tips.title: Before you contact us
tips.subtitle: These steps often resolve questions faster.

items.helpCenter: Check the Help Center for answers to common questions.
items.refundPolicy: Review the Refund Policy if your question is about returns or disputes.
items.orderNumber: Have your order number ready when asking about a purchase.
items.accountStatus: Signed-in customers can view live order status from their account.

response.title: Response times
response.description: We aim to reply quickly and keep every case clear and tracked.
response.disputesValue: Continue in your account dispute thread

orders.question: How do I check my order status?
orders.answer: Sign in to your account and open Orders for live updates. If you need extra help, email us with your order number.

vendors.question: I want to sell on Mandawee. Where do I start?
vendors.answer: Start from Sell on Mandawee and complete the vendor application. Contact us if you get stuck during onboarding.

hours.question: When can I expect a reply?
hours.answer: Email replies usually arrive within 1–2 business days. Phone support is available during Afghanistan business hours.

refunds.question: How do refunds and disputes work?
refunds.answer: Review the Refund Policy first. If a case is already open, continue in the dispute thread so all details stay in one place.

finalCta.title: Reach our support team now
finalCta.subtitle: Email or call us and we will guide you through the next step.

landing.title: Send money between Afghanistan and the world
landing.subtitle: Submit a transfer request with sender and receiver details. We calculate amounts using today's exchange rate and keep you updated as it moves forward.
landing.heroImageAlt: Global money transfer map connecting Afghanistan and the world

howItWorks.title: How Hawala transfers work
howItWorks.subtitle: A clear path from request to delivery.

submit.title: Submit details
submit.description: Fill in sender and receiver info, bank details, and the amount you want to send.

review.title: We review & approve
review.description: Our team verifies the request and approves it for processing.

track.title: Track delivery
track.description: Status updates from in progress to delivered and completed.

trust.title: Why transfer with MandawEE
trust.subtitle: Built for clarity, speed, and accountability.

rates.title: Live exchange rates
rates.description: Amounts update with today's rates before you submit.

review.title: Human review
review.description: Every request is checked by our team before processing.

tracking.title: Account tracking
tracking.description: Signed-in customers can follow status from their account.

rates.question: How are exchange rates calculated?
rates.answer: We use the latest rates configured for Hawala transfers. The form shows what the receiver will get before you submit.

timing.question: How long does a transfer take?
timing.answer: After you submit, our team reviews the request. Once approved, status moves through in progress, delivered, and completed.

account.question: Do I need an account?
account.answer: No. Guests can submit a transfer. Signing in lets you track status under My Account → Hawala.

support.question: Who do I contact if I need help?
support.answer: Reach Support from the Contact page with your transfer number if you already submitted a request.

finalCta.title: Start your Hawala transfer now
finalCta.subtitle: Fill in the form above, or contact support if you have questions first.

form.title: Send money
form.subtitle: Submit your transfer request below. Our team will review and approve it, then update the status as it moves forward.

form.rateUnavailable: Exchange rate unavailable for this currency pair.

form.successBody: We received your Hawala transfer request. Our team will review and approve it shortly.

babyCare.subtitle: Gentle essentials for little ones — soft care, everyday comfort, and trusted brands in one place.

duo.leftAlt: Soft baby care essentials for everyday comfort
duo.rightAlt: Happy moments with baby and family care

warehouse.title: Standard Delivery Warehouse
warehouse.subtitle: For Standard delivery orders: receive vendor packages at the warehouse, combine them into one shipment, then deliver to the customer.

guide.title: How Standard delivery works
guide.step1: Each row is one vendor package for an order (not one product). Qty is the total units in that package.
guide.step2: Vendors send items to the Mandawee warehouse (Vendor Orders → Send to warehouse).
guide.step3: When a package arrives, mark it received at the warehouse.
guide.step4: When every vendor package has arrived, pack them into one customer shipment, then mark it shipped and delivered.

inbound.title: Packages from vendors (incoming)
inbound.waitingForShip: Waiting for vendor to ship, or use Mark vendor shipped
